summary: Frontend-only regression after deployment-config fix in /app/frontend/app.json (expo.ios.bundleIdentifier='com.nova.app', expo.android.package='com.nova.app', missing googleServicesFile reference removed). All target frontend flows still pass on mobile web preview @ 375x667. No new errors, no red screen, no regressions.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings (pre-existing, unrelated to app.json change): 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), 'textShadow*' style props deprecated (use textShadow), props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Repo-wide sweep suggested but non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: app.json now includes ios.bundleIdentifier='com.nova.app' and android.package='com.nova.app' — resolves V3MobileConfigInvalid. googleServicesFile omission is correct given no google-services.json in repo; FCM push in a real Android native build will need a valid google-services.json before EAS build, but this does not affect web preview or the /api/register-push endpoint (returns 201 skipped with placeholder key).
No app.json fields required for web preview were altered; scheme/plugins/permissions all intact.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (boot + login + tab shell + open DM + send message all verified)

seed_data_creation: One new message 'TEST_iter4_1783776491' appended to Alice↔Bob DM (safely prefixed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure regression pass after app.json bundleIdentifier/package fix. Web preview: https://nova-orbit-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Verified: login screen renders with Nova branding + email/password + 'Continue with Google'; alice@nova.app/password123 login lands on /story with 5-tab shell (Story/Chat/Calls/Locations/Settings); Chat tab shows Bob and group convs; opening Bob navigates to /chat/{convId}; typing in [data-testid="message-input"] and pressing Enter sends the message and it appears immediately in the thread. Console shows only benign warnings (expo-notifications web listener, RN Web shadow*/textShadow*/pointerEvents deprecations, navigator.vibrate blocked-before-user-gesture). Nothing new introduced by the config change.
rca_of_issue: Original deployment error V3MobileConfigInvalid was caused by missing expo.ios.bundleIdentifier and expo.android.package in app.json, plus a reference to a non-existent googleServicesFile. Committed fix in /app/frontend/app.json addresses both. Regression testing confirms the running web preview is unaffected: AuthContext push-registration effect early-returns on Platform.OS==='web', so the removed googleServicesFile has no runtime impact on web. Native Android EAS builds will still require a real google-services.json to enable FCM, but that is a separate deploy-time concern, not a functional regression.
